name: story_node
description: A single narrative moment in the interactive adventure game.

title.description: A short, evocative title for this story node.

narrative_text.description: The main atmospheric text describing what the player sees and experiences.

text.description: The action the player can choose to take next.

is_risky.description: True if this choice requires a skill check (dice roll).

difficulty.description: The Difficulty Class (1-20) if this is a risky choice. 0 if not risky.

available_choices.description: The actions the player can choose to take next. If empty, the game assumes an end-state.

inventory_changes.description: Items the player gained or lost (e.g. ['+Rusty Key', '-Gold Coin']). Empty if no changes.

body.description: Required base core field by WordClaw.

health_delta.description: The impact this narrative choice has on the player's health.

score_delta.description: The score points rewarded or penalized by this node.
